dataset: AgML agricultural segmentation selection used by SegRAG
note: The repository stores image identifiers and relative file names, not image pixels.
selection_rule: For each class, use the first 30 sorted training image IDs containing that class after filtering to the selected AgML classes. Numeric image IDs are sorted numerically; non-numeric IDs would use lexical fallback. If fewer than 30 images exist, all available images are used.
iccd_note: ICCD filters patch descriptors inside the selected support images; it does not change the support image identifier manifest.
